name: 1.5HP Inverter Split AC
description: 1.5HP inverter split air conditioner with R32 refrigerant, 5-star energy rating, auto-restart, sleep mode, self-cleaning, anti-bacterial filter and 4-way air distribution.

name: 4-Burner Gas Cooker with Oven
description: Stainless steel 4-burner gas cooker with full glass oven, auto-ignition, flame failure device, rotisserie grill and tempered glass lid. 60cm freestanding design.

name: 55" 4K UHD Smart TV
description: 55-inch 4K Ultra HD Smart TV with HDR10, built-in Wi-Fi, Netflix & YouTube access, 3 HDMI ports and Dolby Audio surround sound. Energy-saving LED backlit display.

name: 2.5KVA Pure Sine Wave Inverter
description: 2500VA pure sine wave inverter with 24V input, built-in MPPT solar charge controller, USB charging port, LCD display and battery protection system.

name: 5KVA Silent Generator
description: 5KVA soundproof diesel generator with electric start, ATS compatibility, 12-hour run time on full tank, AVR voltage regulation and 4 outlets. Industrial-grade build.

name: CCTV 8-Camera Security Kit
description: Complete 8-camera 5MP CCTV system with 2TB NVR, night vision up to 40m, weatherproof cameras, motion detection alerts and remote viewing via mobile app.

name: DC Ceiling Fan with LED Light
description: 56-inch DC motor ceiling fan with 18W integrated LED light, remote control, 6-speed settings, silent operation, reversible motor and energy-saving technology.

name: Front Load Washing Machine 8kg
description: 8kg front-loading washing machine with 15 wash programs, quick-wash 30-min cycle, steam clean function, and anti-vibration technology. Quiet and energy efficient.

name: HP LaserJet Pro Printer
description: Monochrome laser printer with wireless printing, automatic two-sided printing, 35-page ADF, mobile printing via HP Smart app. Up to 30ppm print speed.

name: High-Speed Blender 2L
description: Professional 2-litre blender with 1500W motor, 6-blade stainless steel assembly, 5-speed settings + pulse, BPA-free Tritan jar, and self-cleaning function.

name: iPhone 15 Pro Max 256GB
description: Apple iPhone 15 Pro Max with A17 Pro chip, 48MP triple camera system with 5x optical zoom, titanium design, Action Button, USB-C and up to 29 hours video playback.

name: L-Shape Sectional Sofa
description: Modern L-shaped sectional sofa in premium leatherette upholstery, high-density foam cushions, solid hardwood frame and 6-seater capacity. Available in black and grey.

name: MacBook Air M2 13" 256GB
description: Apple MacBook Air with M2 chip, 8GB RAM, 256GB SSD, 13.6-inch Liquid Retina display, MagSafe charging, up to 18-hour battery life and fanless silent design.

name: Microwave Oven 30L
description: 30-litre microwave with grill function, convection cooking, 8 auto-cook menus, child safety lock, LED interior light and stainless steel cavity for easy cleaning.

name: Samsung Galaxy Tab S9
description: 11-inch AMOLED display tablet with Snapdragon 8 Gen 2, 128GB storage, IP68 water resistance, S Pen included, DeX mode for desktop experience and 8000mAh battery.

name: Side-by-Side Refrigerator 600L
description: 600-litre side-by-side refrigerator with water & ice dispenser, multi-flow cooling, inverter compressor, frost-free technology and LED interior lighting. A+ energy rating.

name: Stand Mixer 6.5L Professional
description: 6.5-litre professional stand mixer with 10-speed settings, stainless steel bowl, dough hook, flat beater and wire whip attachments. 800W powerful motor with planetary mixing.

name: Wireless Bluetooth Speaker
description: 360° surround sound portable speaker with 24-hour battery life, IPX7 waterproof rating, dual pairing mode and deep bass. Perfect for indoor and outdoor use.
